body:
## ملخص — V14 Controlled Preview Execution & Quality Assurance

هذا الـ PR يضيف **المستوى الرابع عشر** من Dealix فوق V1–V13، ويحوّل قرار Controlled Preview إلى تنفيذ يومي مضبوط لأول أسبوع وأول 5 عملاء.

---

## ما الذي أُضيف؟

### `controlled-preview/` — خطة الإطلاق المنضبط
- `CONTROLLED_PREVIEW_MASTER_PLAN_AR.md` — أول 5 عملاء، founder-led، لا SaaS self-serve
- `LAUNCH_WEEK_EXECUTION_AR.md` — تنفيذ يومي Day 0→7 (Merge→Outreach→Discovery→Proposals→Delivery→Proof→CEO Review)
- `PREVIEW_EXIT_CRITERIA_AR.md` — معايير الخروج من Controlled Preview

### `merge-control/` — حماية الـ PR وقت الدمج
- `PR_MERGE_GATE_AR.md` — 7 blockers: لا secrets، لا workflows بدون permissions، لا self-serve flag، لا claims غير مثبتة، لا service role في frontend، لا route بدون tenant guard، لا PR بدون rollback plan
- `WORKFLOW_PERMISSION_FIX_GUIDE_AR.md` — دليل إصلاح workflows المفتقرة لـ `permissions:`

### `quality-gates/` — بوابات الجودة
- `SERVICE_QUALITY_GATE_AR.md` — 7 نقاط قبل التسليم لكل Pilot
- `CLIENT_DELIVERY_ACCEPTANCE_GATE_AR.md` — Scope→Invoice→Baseline→Proof→Human Review→Client Acceptance

### `scripts/` — 8 scripts جديدة
| Script | الوظيفة |
|--------|---------|
| `dealix_v14_readiness_check.py` | يتحقق من 11 ملف حرج |
| `dealix_controlled_preview_plan.py` | يتتبع مراحل عملاء Preview |
| `dealix_launch_week_command_center.py` | مؤشرات أسبوع الإطلاق |
| `dealix_preview_quality_gate.py` | بوابة جودة 7 نقاط (PASS/FAIL) |
| `dealix_preview_acceptance_gate.py` | بوابة قبول العميل |
| `dealix_post_launch_review.py` | مراجعة ما بعد الإطلاق → CONTINUE/PAUSE/STOP |
| `dealix_workflow_permission_audit.py` | تدقيق صلاحيات GitHub Actions |
| `dealix_v14_daily_run.py` | Orchestrator يومي لجميع فحوصات V14 |

### `frontend/` — صفحتان جديدتان
- `/controlled-preview` — صفحة Preview العامة
- `/internal/preview-command` — Command Center داخلي

### `.github/workflows/dealix-v14-controlled-preview.yml`
- يشغل readiness + preview plan + quality gate + post-launch review
- `permissions: contents: read` — least privilege

### `data/preview/` — بيانات اصطناعية للتطوير
- `preview_clients.json`, `launch_week_metrics.json`, `quality_gate_results.jsonl`, `post_launch_reviews.jsonl`

---

## نتائج التحقق

```
✅ Readiness: OK (11/11 critical files)
✅ Quality Gate: PASS
✅ Post-Launch Score: 4/4 → CONTINUE_PREVIEW
✅ Preview Decision: keep managed controlled preview; do not open self-serve SaaS yet
⚠️  Workflow Permission Audit: 13 workflows تحتاج مراجعة permissions
```

---

## خطة الاختبار

- [ ] `make dealix-v14-readiness` → يطبع "OK: 11 critical files"
- [ ] `make dealix-controlled-preview` → plan + quality gate + post-launch PASS
- [ ] `make dealix-workflow-permissions` → يطبع قائمة الـ workflows التي تحتاج permissions
- [ ] GitHub Action `dealix-v14-controlled-preview.yml` يعمل على push/PR
- [ ] صفحتا Frontend تُبنيان بدون أخطاء TypeScript

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01Mr2cHWain2d2GTFoRXtM8G)_

commits.messageBody:
… Assurance Layer

Adds the full V14 layer on top of V1–V13:

Controlled Preview:
- CONTROLLED_PREVIEW_MASTER_PLAN_AR.md — first 5 clients, founder-led, no SaaS self-serve
- LAUNCH_WEEK_EXECUTION_AR.md — Day 0–7 execution plan (Merge→Outreach→Discovery→Proposals→Delivery→Proof→CEO Review)
- PREVIEW_EXIT_CRITERIA_AR.md — criteria for exiting controlled preview to broader launch

Merge Control:
- PR_MERGE_GATE_AR.md — 7 merge blockers (secrets, permissions, self-serve flag, unverified claims, etc.)
- WORKFLOW_PERMISSION_FIX_GUIDE_AR.md — fix guide for workflows missing permissions: block

Quality Gates:
- SERVICE_QUALITY_GATE_AR.md — per-pilot quality checks before delivery
- CLIENT_DELIVERY_ACCEPTANCE_GATE_AR.md — client acceptance criteria (Scope→Invoice→Baseline→Proof→Human review)

Scripts (8 new):
- dealix_v14_readiness_check.py — verifies 11 critical preview files present
- dealix_controlled_preview_plan.py — tracks preview clients and stage
- dealix_launch_week_command_center.py — launch week metrics dashboard
- dealix_preview_quality_gate.py — 7-point quality gate (PASS/FAIL)
- dealix_preview_acceptance_gate.py — client acceptance gate
- dealix_post_launch_review.py — 4-point post-launch score → CONTINUE/PAUSE/STOP
- dealix_workflow_permission_audit.py — audits workflows missing permissions: block
- dealix_v14_daily_run.py — daily orchestrator for all V14 checks

Frontend (2 new pages):
- /controlled-preview — public preview landing page
- /internal/preview-command — internal preview command center

GitHub Action:
- dealix-v14-controlled-preview.yml (permissions: contents: read)

Data:
- data/preview/ — synthetic preview clients, launch week metrics, QA results, post-launch reviews

All scripts verified: readiness OK (11/11), quality gate PASS, post-launch score 4/4, decision CONTINUE_PREVIEW
commits.messageHeadline: feat(launch): add Dealix V14 — Controlled Preview Execution & Quality…

commits.messageBody:
…0.28.0

gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2 requires a paid org license; switch to direct
CLI install which is free for all repos. aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0
tag was not resolvable; bump to 0.28.0.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): replace gitleaks-action with free CLI, bump trivy-action to …

commits.messageBody:
…-6x23

aquasecurity/trivy-action (multiple versions) flagged by dependency-review
for supply chain compromise (GHSA-69fq-xp46-6x23). Install trivy binary
directly at v0.58.0 instead — avoids the action entirely.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): replace trivy-action with direct CLI to avoid GHSA-69fq-xp46…

commits.messageBody:
v0.58.0 returned 404 — hardcoded version was wrong. Use the releases/latest
API with GITHUB_TOKEN to resolve the current version at runtime.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): discover trivy version dynamically via GitHub API

commits.messageBody:
…es API

GitHub API returned 403 from the runner context; apt repo is the official
recommended install method per aquasecurity docs and needs no version pinning.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): install trivy via official apt repo instead of GitHub releas…

commits.messageBody:
… next.js CVEs

stripe-secret-token false positives: scripts/v10_master_verify.sh and
v7_launch_verify.sh use sk_live_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,} as a grep PATTERN to hunt
for secrets — trivy misidentifies the regex as a real credential.

Next.js CVEs (CVE-2026-44573/78/79, GHSA-8h8q/h25m/mwv6/q4gf): pre-existing
in next.js 15.1.3, not introduced by V14. Suppressed here pending a dedicated
next.js >=15.5.16 upgrade PR.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): add .trivyignore for Stripe false positives and pre-existing…

commits.messageBody:
…scripts

next.js CVEs fixed by upgrading to 15.5.18:
- CVE-2025-29927 (CRITICAL) Authorization Bypass in Middleware (fixed 15.2.3)
- CVE-2025-55182 (CRITICAL) Pre-auth RCE via unsafe deserialization (fixed 15.1.9)
- CVE-2025-49826 (HIGH)     DoS (fixed 15.1.8)
- CVE-2026-44573/78/79, GHSA-8h8q/h25m/mwv6/q4gf (fixed 15.5.16)

Stripe secret false positives in verify scripts suppressed via --skip-files
instead of .trivyignore (scripts contain grep regex patterns, not real keys).
commits.messageHeadline: fix(deps+ci): bump next.js 15.1.3→15.5.18, fix trivy skip for verify …

commits.messageBody:
Same CVE set as frontend: CVE-2025-29927/55182/49826 and 2026 advisories.
apps/web had its own package-lock.json that trivy was also scanning.

title: feat(launch): Dealix V14 — Controlled Preview Execution & Quality Assurance Layer
